tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List Mako Metrics plans with pricing, what's included, scope limits, delivery, guarantee, and links to verify the merchant. Use this to recommend a plan before ordering.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create a Mako Metrics order brief for a customer and return a Stripe checkout link for them to complete payment. The PDF report is emailed within 24h after payment. No payment is taken by this tool — it only returns a pay link the human opens.
